description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a round, terracotta-colored pot filled with dark soil speckled with white particles, likely perlite or small stones. Emerging from the soil are several green stems of varying heights, each supporting a broad, elongated green leaf with visible veins. The leaves are arranged asymmetrically, with some arching outward and others standing more upright, giving the plant a youthful, sprouting appearance. The pot itself has a simple, unadorned design with a subtle horizontal ridge near its upper third, suggesting a classic terracotta style. The overall look is natural and minimalistic, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. No decorative elements or plant identification tags are visible on the pot or plant.
description: A small terracotta-style pot holds a young green plant with several upright stems and broad, veined leaves, set in dark, speckled soil. The design is simple and natural, with no visible decorations or labels.
description_view_0: From this angle, three main green stems and several broad leaves are visible, with the largest leaf extending to the right and the soil surface clearly showing white speckles.
description_view_1: This view highlights the tallest stem and a single prominent leaf arching to the left, with the pot's round shape and soil surface in clear view.
description_view_2: Here, the leaves are more horizontally oriented, with one large leaf extending toward the viewer and the stems appearing clustered together.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the back of the plant, with two leaves curving outward and the tallest stem positioned centrally, while the pot's ridge is visible.
